title: Toggle Task Completion
summary: Users can mark tasks as complete or revert them to incomplete. The visual state updates immediately.

behaviorStatements.text: When a user toggles an incomplete task, the system shall mark it as complete and update the visual indicator.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall mark it as complete and update the visual indicator

behaviorStatements.text: When a user toggles a complete task, the system shall mark it as incomplete and update the visual indicator.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall mark it as incomplete and update the visual indicator
